overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban downtown. The player character walks along wet sidewalks, crosses a street intersection with changing traffic lights, passes a prominent teal neon 'GREEN EMP' building, and continues under an industrial overpass as visible rain begins to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with orange neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the distant skyscraper, passing orange neon structures on the left

entered.detail: building facade with prominent orange neon tube lighting and industrial metal beams
tall illuminated skyscraper with grid-like window pattern dominating the skyline
yellow-topped concrete barriers lining the edge of the sidewalk
tall street lamp with warm orange glow illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, with an orange neon-lit building on the left and a massive skyscraper visible in the distance. The camera walks forward steadily along the concrete path, passing street lamps that cast reflections on the rain-slicked ground.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: stepping off the curb and crossing the wet asphalt intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person walking across the crosswalk from right to left, passing in front of the camera

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals showing red then changing to green
blue and red neon sign with beverage advertisement
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
large illuminated billboard with text and graphics spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a wide intersection, crossing the wet asphalt crosswalk as the traffic light changes from red to green. A pedestrian crosses paths from the right, and a large billboard becomes visible spanning the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corner with prominent teal neon signage

events.description: rain becomes visibly falling as white streaks against the dark sky and neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking past the GREEN EMP building entrance, observing the teal neon signage and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large teal neon sign reading 'GREEN EMP' with a circular logo element
dark facade building with teal accent lighting and ground floor entrance
sleek black vehicle parked along the curb near the GREEN EMP entrance

segments.scene_description: Visible rain begins to fall as the camera walks past the GREEN EMP building with its prominent teal neon signage. The scene features parked vehicles along the curb and wet pavement reflecting the cyan and orange neon lights, with a large billboard approaching ahead.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass, changing from open sky to sheltered corridor

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through a more enclosed industrial corridor with scattered debris

entered.detail: large concrete and steel overpass structure spanning across the street overhead
dark industrial building with minimal lighting and metal paneling
scattered trash bags and discarded items accumulated along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions into a semi-covered industrial corridor beneath the overpass, where the sky is mostly obscured by the bridge structure above. The environment becomes more enclosed with debris scattered along the left side, while the wet pavement continues to reflect the sparse artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban center that transitions from open neon-lit streets into a confined industrial underpass. It begins on a wet city sidewalk, moving steadily past an orange neon building toward a distant skyscraper as street lamps reflect off the damp concrete. As the camera enters a wide intersection, it crosses the asphalt just as the traffic light shifts to green, passing a pedestrian and moving toward a large overhead billboard. The scene then shifts as visible rain begins to fall, leading the camera past the prominent teal neon signage of the GREEN EMP building and a row of parked vehicles reflecting cyan and orange light. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera moves beneath a massive overpass, where the sky is obscured by the bridge structure and debris litters the edges of the wet pavement.
